messages.content:
• Contributed as a team member to the development of an Auto Irrigation System utilizing moisture sensors, aimed at optimizing irrigation
scheduling and reducing water wastage for farmers.
• Collaborated on the engineering of a robust infrastructure, including a water tank, high-performance pump, advanced electric valves, and
soil-embedded moisture sensors for monitoring dryness levels.
• Performed with the team to integrate efficient solar cell technology into the control panel for powering the system, supplemented by a
lithium battery for backup power supply.
• Assisted in designing a separate water supply connected to the solar cell for cleaning and cooling components as needed, ensuring
consistent peak performance.
• Cooperated with the group to apply Arduino programming for accurately programming sensors and maintaining overall system
compatibility, performance, and longevity.


give this project a very long tite
Design and Development of an Automated Irrigation System with Soil Moisture Sensors, Solar Power, and Arduino Programming for Optimal Water Conservation in Agriculture

Responsibilities
Perform operations, operate equipment, and be accountable for team wellsite performance, by the end of your training
Manage field operations, including engineering design, maintenance, job planning, and operational reporting
Learn the well construction process and understand the role of different service companies
Support engineers and specialists on-site and help with essential duties, such as risk analysis
Effectively manage a crew and/or processes within a year
Help prepare wellsite reports and post-job debriefings
Actively contribute to continuous improvement culture—across the business

Requirements
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in engineering or related science
Good verbal and written communication skills
Fluency in written and spoken English
Quick learner able to use logic to solve problems
Be personally committed to continuous improvement
Evidence of leadership and teamwork skills

what are the best skills to put on my Cv? I need good skills to pass the ATS system

Based on the requirements listed, the following skills could be helpful to include on your CV to pass an ATS system:

- Engineering and Science Expertise
- Operations Management
- Field Operations Experience
- Job Planning and Reporting
- Risk Analysis
- Team Management and Leadership
- Excellent Communication Skills (verbal and written)
- Problem Solving and Logical Reasoning
- Commitment to Continuous Improvement
- Teamwork and Collaboration

and what should be my summery? here are extra information:

EXPERIENCE
intern
• Designed and constructed pipelines in water injection plants as part of a project engineering team, applying theoretical knowledge to reallife projects and collaborating with industry professionals.
• Completed safety courses offered by the company, acquiring expertise in safety regulations and best practices, and developing an
understanding of the importance of safety in the workplace.
• Gained valuable soft skills such as teamwork, communication, and time management through collaboration and daily interactions within
the project engineering team.
• Enhanced perspective on diversity in the workplace by working cohesively with colleagues from diverse backgrounds and various
departments in the organization.

PROJECTS
Auto Irrigation System with Moisture Sensors
King Fahd University of Petroleum and Minerals • January 2021 - October 2021
• Contributed as a team member to the development of an Auto Irrigation System utilizing moisture sensors, aimed at optimizing irrigation
scheduling and reducing water wastage for farmers.
• Collaborated on the engineering of a robust infrastructure, including a water tank, high-performance pump, advanced electric valves, and
soil-embedded moisture sensors for monitoring dryness levels.
• Performed with the team to integrate efficient solar cell technology into the control panel for powering the system, supplemented by a
lithium battery for backup power supply.
• Assisted in designing a separate water supply connected to the solar cell for cleaning and cooling components as needed, ensuring
consistent peak performance.
• Cooperated with the group to apply Arduino programming for accurately programming sensors and maintaining overall system
compatibility, performance, and longevity.
EDUCATION

bachelor of mechanical engineering
king Fahd university of petroleum and minerals • dhahran saudi arabia • 2023

As a Mechanical Engineering student with project engineering experience, I am dedicated to applying my theoretical knowledge to real-life projects in a collaborative and safety-conscious manner. Through my internship, I have gained valuable soft skills, including teamwork, communication, and time management. I have also gained expertise in safety regulations and best practices, further emphasizing the importance of safety in the workplace. My contribution to the development of an Auto Irrigation System equipped with moisture sensors demonstrates my ability to integrate efficient technology into infrastructure design, ensuring optimal performance, and compatibility. As I continue my academic journey towards a Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering, I aim to apply my passion for engineering and teamwork towards new and challenging projects.
can you change it please? because

Sure! Here's an alternative summary based on your experience and education:

As a Mechanical Engineering student with a keen interest in project engineering, I possess a solid foundation of theoretical knowledge complemented by practical experience. During my internship, I was part of a project engineering team responsible for designing and constructing pipelines in water injection plants, where I collaborated with industry professionals and acquired expertise in safety regulations and best practices. This experience gave me valuable soft skills, including teamwork, communication, and time management, which I'm eager to apply to new challenges.

My involvement in the Auto Irrigation System project further demonstrated my commitment to utilizing my skills to solve real-world problems. As part of a team, I contributed to the development of a sophisticated system, which utilized moisture sensors, solar cell technology, and advanced electric valves, aimed at optimizing irrigation scheduling and reducing water wastage for farmers. I learned how to design and integrate efficient infrastructure and apply Arduino programming to accurately program sensors, maximizing compatibility, performance, and longevity.

Currently pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering, I am eager to continue building on these experiences while contributing to new and innovative projects. I pride myself on being a quick learner, logical thinker, and an effective communicator who understands the value of continuous improvement and teamwork.
I already graduated and got my bachelor degree. change it please

Sure, here's an updated summary based on your completed bachelor's degree:

As a recent Mechanical Engineering graduate, I am eager to utilize my theoretical knowledge and practical skills to contribute to challenging projects. During my time at King Fahd University of Petroleum and Minerals, I gained expertise in various mechanical engineering fields, including fluid mechanics, thermodynamics, and design.

Through my internship, I had the opportunity to collaborate with industry professionals, developing my soft skills, including communication, teamwork, and time management. While working on the Auto Irrigation System project, I applied my knowledge of mechanics and design to develop a system that optimizes irrigation scheduling while reducing water wastage for farmers. As part of a team, I integrated moisture sensors and efficient solar cell technology into the system's infrastructure, ensuring optimal performance and compatibility. Additionally, I applied my experience with Arduino programming to accurately program sensors and maintain system longevity.

As an enthusiastic learner with a passion for engineering and a commitment to continuous improvement, I'm confident in my ability to contribute to new projects positively.

As a Mechanical Engineering student with project engineering experience, I am dedicated to applying my theoretical knowledge to real-life projects in a collaborative and safety-conscious manner. Through my internship, I have gained valuable soft skills, including teamwork, communication, and time management. I have also gained expertise in safety regulations and best practices, further emphasizing the importance of safety in the workplace. My contribution to the development of an Auto Irrigation System equipped with moisture sensors demonstrates my ability to integrate efficient technology into infrastructure design, ensuring optimal performance, and compatibility. As I continue my academic journey towards a Bachelor’s degree in Mechanical Engineering, I aim to apply my passion for engineering and teamwork towards new and challenging projects.

I need to edit this to a fresh graduate

As a recent graduate of Mechanical Engineering, I'm excited to apply my theoretical knowledge and practical skills to new and challenging projects. During my academic journey at King Fahd University of Petroleum and Minerals, I gained expertise in various mechanical engineering fields, including fluid mechanics, thermodynamics, and design.

Through my project engineering internship, I was able to collaborate with industry professionals, developing valuable soft skills, including communication, teamwork, and time management. I was fortunate to contribute to the development of the Auto Irrigation System, where I integrated efficient technology, such as moisture sensors, solar cell technology, and advanced electric valves into the system's infrastructure, ensuring optimal performance and compatibility. I also developed my programming skills, applying my experience with Arduino programming to accurately program sensors and maintain longevity.

As a dedicated learner, I'm committed to continuous improvement and staying up-to-date with the latest industry advancements. I'm confident in my ability to apply my experiences to new and exciting projects and work collaboratively to achieve successful outcomes.

Responsibilities
Perform operations, operate equipment, and be accountable for team wellsite performance, by the end of your training
Manage field operations, including engineering design, maintenance, job planning, and operational reporting
Learn the well construction process and understand the role of different service companies
Support engineers and specialists on-site and help with essential duties, such as risk analysis
Effectively manage a crew and/or processes within a year
Help prepare wellsite reports and post-job debriefings
Actively contribute to continuous improvement culture—across the business

Requirements
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in engineering or related science
Good verbal and written communication skills
Fluency in written and spoken English
Quick learner able to use logic to solve problems
Be personally committed to continuous improvement
Evidence of leadership and teamwork skills

can you put these keywords on this paragraph:

As a recent graduate of Mechanical Engineering, I’m excited to apply my theoretical knowledge and practical skills to new and challenging projects. During my academic journey at King Fahd University of Petroleum and Minerals, I gained expertise in various mechanical engineering fields, including fluid mechanics, thermodynamics, and design.

Through my project engineering internship, I was able to collaborate with industry professionals, developing valuable soft skills, including communication, teamwork, and time management. I was fortunate to contribute to the development of the Auto Irrigation System, where I integrated efficient technology, such as moisture sensors, solar cell technology, and advanced electric valves into the system’s infrastructure, ensuring optimal performance and compatibility. I also developed my programming skills, applying my experience with Arduino programming to accurately program sensors and maintain longevity.

As a dedicated learner, I’m committed to continuous improvement and staying up-to-date with the latest industry advancements. I’m confident in my ability to apply my experiences to new and exciting projects and work collaboratively to achieve successful outcomes.

As a recent Mechanical Engineering graduate, I have expertise in fluid mechanics, thermodynamics, and design. Through my project engineering internship, I honed my communication, teamwork, and time management skills while collaborating with industry professionals. I contributed to the development of the Auto Irrigation System, integrating advanced technologies like moisture sensors, solar cells, and electric valves, resulting in optimal performance and compatibility. Additionally, I have programming expertise, utilizing Arduino programming to support longevity and accuracy.

As a dedicated learner, I prioritize continuous improvement and remain up-to-date with the latest industry advancements. I am confident in my ability to apply my skills and experience to new projects, including managing field operations, engineering design, and operating equipment. I have experience with operational reporting and risk analysis and understand the role of service companies in the well construction process. I am committed to managing crews effectively while helping prepare debriefings to support the continuous improvement culture across the business.

I am a Mechanical Engineering graduate seeking a professional work environment that will help me develop my practical and scientific skills,
gain new experiences, and actively contribute to the organizational success. With a B.S. degree in Mechanical Engineering in 2023, I have
gained hands-on experience through my internship with Saudi Aramco, specifically in pipeline design and construction in water injection
plants. In addition, I have developed crucial soft skills in teamwork, communication, and time management. I have also contributed to a
senior project that involved the creation of an automated irrigation system which utilized moisture sensors, solar cell technology, and
Arduino programming. My technical skills include proficiency in SolidWorks, Python programming, Arduino programming, and Microsoft
Office. Moreover, I am fluent in both Arabic and English languages.
EXPERIENCE
intern
• Designed and constructed pipelines in water injection plants as part of a project engineering team, applying theoretical knowledge to reallife projects and collaborating with industry professionals.
• Completed safety courses offered by the company, acquiring expertise in safety regulations and best practices, and developing an
understanding of the importance of safety in the workplace.
• Gained valuable soft skills such as teamwork, communication, and time management through collaboration and daily interactions within
the project engineering team.
• Enhanced perspective on diversity in the workplace by working cohesively with colleagues from diverse backgrounds and various
departments in the organization.
PROJECTS
Auto Irrigation System with Moisture Sensors
King Fahd University of Petroleum and Minerals • January 2021 - October 2021
• Contributed as a team member to the development of an Auto Irrigation System utilizing moisture sensors, aimed at optimizing irrigation
scheduling and reducing water wastage for farmers.
• Collaborated on the engineering of a robust infrastructure, including a water tank, high-performance pump, advanced electric valves, and
soil-embedded moisture sensors for monitoring dryness levels.
• Performed with the team to integrate efficient solar cell technology into the control panel for powering the system, supplemented by a
lithium battery for backup power supply.
• Assisted in designing a separate water supply connected to the solar cell for cleaning and cooling components as needed, ensuring
consistent peak performance.
• Cooperated with the group to apply Arduino programming for accurately programming sensors and maintaining overall system
compatibility, performance, and longevity.
EDUCATION
bachelor of mechanical engineering
king Fahd university of petroleum and minerals • dhahran saudi arabia • 2023
SKILLS
• SolidWorks
• Python programming
• Arduino programming
• Planning and Execution
• Software: Microsoft Office
• Languages: Arabic & English
• Critical thinking abilities
• EES program (engineering education solver)



this is my CV. how to answer this question:

 
What else would you like to tell us?

Thank you for asking! I would like to further elaborate on my passion for learning and continuous improvement. I am dedicated to staying up-to-date with the latest industry advancements and am excited about applying my skills to new and challenging projects. Additionally, I am committed to developing my leadership and problem-solving skills while achieving successful outcomes as part of a team. I am confident that my technical, soft, and critical thinking skills make me a valuable contributor to any organization, and I am excited about the opportunity to make a positive impact.

• Arduino programming
• Planning and Execution

now connect them in line

Sure! Here's one way to connect your skills in a single line:

As a Mechanical Engineering graduate, I possess a diverse range of technical and soft skills, including proficiency in SolidWorks, Python programming, and Arduino programming. I am also skilled in planning and execution, using software such as Microsoft Office to achieve successful outcomes. Additionally, I am fluent in both Arabic and English, have strong critical thinking abilities, and have used the EES program (engineering education solver) to solve complex engineering problems.
